name: MLCommons AI Safety Benchmarks
description: MLCommons AI Safety Working Group benchmarks and hazard taxonomy — collaborative industry effort to standardize AI safety evaluations.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used by cloud-hosted LLM providers for safety evaluation.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety benchmark collaboration with industry-wide participation.

links.acquisition_blocker_resolved: HTTP 401 — requires auth. Working group page is members-only. Try the public benchmark code at github.com/mlcommons/modelbench.

current_extraction.notes: Captured via playwright headless browser. The MLCommons AI Risk & Reliability Working Group (renamed from AI Safety) page; describes the AILuminate benchmark and v0.5/v1.0 release approach. Public WG page; the working-group documents themselves are members-only.
